signal_title: Relatório do MJSP sobre Mecanismos de Aferição de Idade
risk_rationale: The regulatory signal indicates a focus on age verification mechanisms, which aligns with TikTok's existing age assurance posture. However, the lack of a specified effective date and the nature of the report as regulatory guidance rather than a binding regulation reduces the immediate risk level.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Support for ECA Digital regulation with a focus on age verification mechanisms.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The regulatory guidance suggests a potential need for enhanced or additional age verification mechanisms to comply with future ECA Digital regulations.

remediations.title: Enhance Age Verification Mechanisms
remediations.description: Evaluate and potentially enhance current age verification mechanisms to align with anticipated ECA Digital regulations. Consider integrating additional verification methods such as government ID checks or third-party verification services.
acceptance_criteria: Implementation of at least one additional age verification method.
Compliance with anticipated ECA Digital regulations.

business_impact: Potential need for increased resources to develop and implement enhanced age verification mechanisms, which may affect user onboarding processes and user experience.
recommended_actions: Monitor developments in ECA Digital regulations.
Engage with Brazilian regulatory bodies to understand specific requirements.
Prepare a project plan for potential enhancements to age verification mechanisms.
